messages.author: Reeding
messages.text: Heya, I looked at the documentation and if I understand it correctly, room servers are only meant as a single chat room, not a cache for direct messages. When I first heard of room I servers, I thought of it, as a node that holds any kinds of messages it gets and repeats them only via a direct hop to another registered node, when it gets near. Are there any development efforts in that area and would this be something that could be interesting for upstream or rather a feature for a custom fork?
messages.content_html: Heya, I looked at the documentation and if I understand it correctly, room servers are only meant as a single chat room, not a cache for direct messages. When I first heard of room I servers, I thought of it, as a node that holds any kinds of messages it gets and repeats them only via a direct hop to another registered node, when it gets near. Are there any development efforts in that area and would this be something that could be interesting for upstream or rather a feature for a custom fork?

messages.author: Will (WA)
messages.text: Meshtastic has an old, very buggy feature that tries to do this called Store and Forward
messages.content_html: Meshtastic has an old, very buggy feature that tries to do this called Store and Forward

messages.author: Reeding
messages.text: Thanks! Gotta take a look at that
messages.content_html: Thanks! Gotta take a look at that

messages.author: corie☆the.alive
messages.text: wouldn't a full bbs over meshcore be amazing?
messages.content_html: wouldn't a full bbs over meshcore be amazing?

messages.author: Codes
messages.text: If it’s dialing into a particular node that’s all messaged direct it’s probably not too bad.
messages.content_html: If it’s dialing into a particular node that’s all messaged direct it’s probably not too bad.
